name: Sigil-Scrambler
description: Palm-sized device emitting localized EM pulses.
mechanics: Temporarily blinds mid-range biometric scanners. 10m range. 3 uses before recharge.

name: Bypass Key (Orange-spec)
description: Physical override key forged by compromised Orange engineers.
mechanics: Opens 80% of House Codovan industrial locks. Does not work on high-security doors.

name: Filter-Mask (Modified)
description: Standard mask with frequency-hopping comms chip.
mechanics: Allows 200m private communication without using dome-comms.

name: The "Claw"
description: Collapsible high-tensile grappling line with magnetic anchor.
mechanics: Allows climbing vertical shafts. +5 to Athletics for climbing.

name: Sons Whisper-Mic
description: Near-invisible throat-mic used for sub-vocal communication.
mechanics: Requires a Filter-Mask or receiver to hear. DC 18 Perception to notice in use.

name: Pulse-Dampener
description: Small disk that suppresses the signature of active pulse-armor.
mechanics: Hides the EM signature of pulse-armor for 10 minutes.
